# Omar Al-Bakri

> Applied AI engineer and FinTech operator building production AI products across crypto creator intelligence, compliance automation, commercial AI automation, and multi-agent systems.

## About

Omar Al-Bakri is an applied AI engineer and product builder with 15+ years of enterprise FinTech and payments experience. He builds production AI systems using TypeScript, Python, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Redis, LangGraph, GraphRAG, LLM extraction pipelines, and agentic workflow orchestration.

## Key Projects

- [CallScore](https://call-score.com): Crypto creator-intelligence platform that tracks public crypto market calls, scores them against real price data, and ranks creators by alpha, accuracy, consistency, and self-correction.
- ruleIQ: Agentic compliance automation platform using GraphRAG and regulatory knowledge graphs.
- Helios: Autonomous B2B sales automation platform for AI-driven commercial execution.
- thredOS: Multi-agent workflow runtime for policy-controlled long-horizon AI work.

## Expertise

- Applied AI engineering
- Agentic systems
- LangGraph workflows
- LLM extraction and evaluation
- GraphRAG and knowledge graphs
- Full-stack TypeScript and Python engineering
- FinTech and cross-border payments
- Commercial AI automation
- Product strategy and technical execution
